substitution_rule: When a public holiday falls on a Sunday, the following Monday is a public holiday (Section 2 of the Act). Saturday holidays are observed on Saturday with no substitute.

holidays.name: Human Rights Day
holidays.substitute_note: Falls on Sunday; Monday 22 March 2027 is the observed public holiday

holidays.name: Workers' Day
holidays.note: Falls on Saturday; no Monday substitute for Saturday holidays under the Public Holidays Act

holidays.name: Christmas Day
holidays.note: Falls on Saturday; no Monday substitute for Saturday holidays under the Public Holidays Act

holidays.name: Day of Goodwill
holidays.substitute_note: Falls on Sunday; Monday 27 December 2027 is the observed public holiday

overtime_impact.rule: Employee who works on a public holiday must be paid at least double their normal wage (BCEA Section 18)
overtime_impact.if_not_ordinarily_working: Employer must pay at least double the daily wage for the hours worked
overtime_impact.if_ordinarily_working_and_does_not_work: Employee entitled to normal daily pay
